quests.title: Observe the Herd at Dawn
quests.description: Reach the observation point near the watering hole and watch the Parasaurolophus herd drink without disturbing them.

objectives.text: Reach the observation point near the watering hole
Wait and observe the herd for 30 seconds without moving
Do not trigger panic in the herd

quests.failure_condition: Player enters scatter zone radius — herd panics
quests.emotional_arc: Patience rewarded — player learns to read animal behavior

quests.title: Survive the Stampede
quests.description: A TRex has entered the herd's territory. The Parasaurolophus are panicking. Reach high ground before the stampede crushes you.

objectives.text: The herd is panicking! Get to high ground immediately
Reach one of the three high ground escape points
Survive until the herd disperses (60 seconds)

quests.failure_condition: Player is caught in stampede path — instant death
quests.emotional_arc: Chaos and terror — player understands the raw power of herd animals

quests.title: Follow the Herd North
quests.description: The Parasaurolophus herd is beginning its seasonal migration north. Follow them to discover new territory and resources before the rains come.

objectives.text: Locate the migrating herd near the savanna
Keep pace with the herd — do not fall too far behind
Reach the northern camp before dawn

quests.failure_condition: Player loses sight of herd for more than 120 seconds
quests.emotional_arc: Discovery and endurance — the world is larger than the player imagined

quests.title: Silent Approach
quests.description: The watering hole animals are skittish. Approach the watering hole without triggering their panic response — stay downwind and move slowly.

objectives.text: Approach the watering hole from downwind (south side)
Stay outside the stealth boundary markers
Crouch and move slowly — no sprinting within 600 units
Reach the water's edge without spooking the animals

quests.failure_condition: Any animal at watering hole enters panic state
quests.emotional_arc: Respect for nature — player learns animals are not obstacles but living creatures
quests.notes: Connects to crafting system — filled water skin satisfies thirst survival stat
